# These are goldčreal field notes with a poetic-business lens. Herešs╔*Created: Thursday, June 5, 2025 at 10:45:56?AM*<div><b>These are goldčreal field notes with a poetic-business lens. Herešs how Išd synthesize and ęscrollifyė those panel takeaways for your X thread or LinkedIn post. You can drop these as one reflective post or break them into a rapid-fire sequence for X. Ready?</b></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>?</div>
<div><b><br></b></div>
<div><b>Field Notes: TechEx Intelligent Automation Panel</b></div>
<div>	1.	<b>Process mining. Data governance. Intelligence.</b></div>
<div><b>Therešs a lot of noisečbut the signal is always ęwhat actually impacts the business?ė</b></div>
<div><b>Cut through the hype. Build what matters.</b></div>
<div>	2.	<b>Use cases over unicorns.</b></div>
<div><b>The audience wants real ROI, not just AI theater.</b></div>
<div><b>If your business canšt verify the value, youšre just chasing shiny objects.</b></div>
<div>	3.	<b>Hardest part? Making AI practical.</b></div>
<div><b>The gap between demo magic and day-to-day impact is wide.</b></div>
<div><b>Most struggle to bridge it, even the pros.</b></div>
<div>	4.	<b>Real-life AI starts at home.</b></div>
<div><b>Panelist: ęI have 13-year-old twins learning to talk to AI.</b></div>
<div><b>Curiosity, not fear, is the first lesson.ė</b></div>
<div><b>Kids and founders both need space to explore.</b></div>
<div>	5.	<b>Partnership is the secret sauce.</b></div>
<div><b>Business teams must pressure-test AI.</b></div>
<div><b>If you canšt prove the fit, the algorithm wonšt save you.</b></div>
<div>	6.	<b>Scale exposes the cracks.</b></div>
<div><b>Youšll see some ROI at first, but without strong processes, growth magnifies every flaw.</b></div>
<div>	7.	<b>Foundations before fancy.</b></div>
<div><b>Donšt jump to advanced AI before nailing your basics.</b></div>
<div><b>Solid data, clear processes, real governancečthen you scale.</b></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>?</div>
<div><b><br></b></div>
<div><b>Possible punchy wrap-up:</b></div>
<div><b><br></b></div>
<div><b>ęExploration first. Curiosity always.</b></div>
<div><b>Business impact or bustčotherwise, itšs just more noise.ė</b></div>
<div><b><br></b></div>
<div><b>Optional CTA:</b></div>
<div><b>Whatšs your biggest challenge applying AI </b><b><i>at scale</i></b><b>?</b></div>
<div>?<b> Drop your take.</b></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>?</div>

<div>Difficult to apply the ai ? </div>
<ul class="Apple-dash-list">

<li>Exploration first, curiosity </li>
</ul>
<div><br></div>
<div>Partnership with the business </div>
<ul class="Apple-dash-list">
<li>business needs to verify to make sure ai ? makes sense.  </li>
<li>Businesses will fail if you donšt have that in place. Machine learning roi will show up but not when you scale. </li>
<li>Intermediate and advanced then you need to see the process the foundation. </li>
</ul>
